data.recommendation: Escalate due to leverage ratio exceeding threshold; recommend reducing net debt or increasing EBITDA to bring ratio below 3.5x.
data.headline: Leverage Ratio Breach: Net Debt/EBITDA at 3.55x vs Threshold 3.5x
sections: Situation: Net debt is 420.0 and EBITDA is 118.3, resulting in a leverage ratio of 3.55x, which exceeds the threshold of 3.5x.
Calculation trail: Leverage ratio = net_debt / ebitda = 420.0 / 118.3 = 3.55. No addbacks were applied.
Recommendation: Escalate to management for corrective action; consider debt repayment or EBITDA improvement to restore compliance.
